LanguageData.Ammo_8Gauge_Buck.label: Soellkraft 8 gauge shell (Buck)
LanguageData.Ammo_8Gauge_Buck.description: An uncommon, oversized shotgun shell used primarily in military application.

LanguageData.Ammo_8Gauge_ElectroSlug.description: An uncommon, oversized shotgun shell used primarily in military application.
LanguageData.Bullet_8Gauge_Buck.label: buckshot pellet
